nodes.context: Mexican American prison gang founded in Texas in early 1980s, active in Texas prisons and streets, and in Mexico, involved in drug trafficking.
Splinter faction of HPL consisting of original members from the Rio Grande Valley.
Splinter faction of HPL consisting of members from San Antonio and Houston.

edges.context: HPL 45s was a splinter faction of HPL that later reunited with the other faction under the HPL name in 1998.
16/12s was a splinter faction of HPL that later reunited with the other faction under the HPL name in 1998.
The two factions went to war after a power struggle within HPL.
